channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Katseye Promise There Will Be ‘Many More Coachella’ Appearances During Fest Debut
item.description: 🌟🎶 Katseye bringing the Coachella vibes! Who's ready for more festival magic? 🌴✨ #Katseye #Coachella #MusicMagic

item.title: Morgan Wallen’s U.S. Bank Stadium Setlist: Every Song From Opening Night of His Still The Problem Tour in Minneapolis
item.description: 🎶🔥 Rocking out with Morgan Wallen at U.S. Bank Stadium! Check out his electric setlist from the Still The Problem Tour in Minneapolis! #MorganWallen #SetlistGoals 🤠

item.title: Ninajirachi and Porter Robinson Debut New Song at Coachella
item.description: 🌟 New bop alert! 🎶 @ninajirachi and @porterrobinson dropped a fresh tune at Coachella! 🔥 Who else is vibing to this collab? #MusicNews

item.title: Bini Become First Filipino Group to Perform at Coachella 2026
item.description: 🌟🇵🇭 Making history! Bini is set to light up Coachella 2026 as the first Filipino group to take the stage! 🎤🔥 #BiniAtCoachella

item.title: Zac Brown Wakes Artemis II Crew in Space With Song ‘Free’
item.description: 🚀🎶 Sending good vibes to space! Zac Brown wakes up Artemis II crew with a special serenade of 'Free'! #SpaceJams #ZacBrownBand #MusicInSpace ✨
